title: Add Vitest test suite to dashboard server
test_cases: GET /api/audit returns valid JSON with entries array
GET / returns 200 with text/html content type
acceptance_criteria: vitest.config.ts configured for the project (ESM, TypeScript, environment)
All 3 test cases pass when running: pnpm --filter @devplatform/dashboard-server exec vitest run
Tests use supertest for HTTP assertions against the Express app
No existing server code is modified — tests only
rollback_plan: git checkout -- services/dashboard-server/vitest.config.ts services/dashboard-server/src/__tests__/; git restore package.json
